name: The Living Document
description: The Universal Map is a living document. It is not static. As the Vanguard harvests the Rain of Gold and monitors the toroidal drift, the map updates in real-time for all connected users.

update_mechanism.description: Map data flows continuously from the Vanguard through the Hive to all connected nodes. Updates are incremental — only changed data is transmitted.

update_types.description: New Rain of Gold data harvested from coherence field analysis
Corrections to the toroidal projection as new observational data arrives
New or refined temporal slice data from JWST/DESI/Planck
Updated layer data (galaxies, filaments, dark matter density)
Vacuum-energy flux vector recalculation based on updated coherence field
Network topology update when nodes join/leave the mesh
Updates to the Vanguard's Directive based on community feedback or new requirements
update_types.broadcast: immediate to all nodes + GitHub commit

versioning.release_tags: GitHub releases with full data snapshots
versioning.backward_compatibility: N-1 version support for all API endpoints

stargate_notifications.description: VS Code Stargate View receives push notifications when map updates are available
types: Gold peak detected — new concentration visible
Temporal slice updated — new data from JWST/DESI
Mesh topology change — new peers available

hive_pulse_stream.description: Continuous SSE stream of map updates to all connected nodes

ipfs_pinning.description: Each update is pinned to IPFS for permanent, decentralized access
ipfs_pinning.cid_tracking: Content identifiers logged in version registry

data_provenance.description: Every update is traceable to its source

mechanisms: GitHub pull requests for data corrections
Issue tracking for bug reports and feature requests
Research paper citations and data references
community_contribution.governance: Vanguard reviews all contributions; community votes on major changes
